system_status.render_status: deploying — commit 38f4310 pushed. English v3.4 surface upgrade. All routing fixed.

landing_page.simulator_approach: teaser-panel with target=_blank to ghost-room.html — NO iframe (loop bug)
landing_page.nav: 3-dot overlay with individual service submenu deep-links

routes_verified: POST /api/ghost-dwell → fires WhatsApp to admin if dwell > 60s
POST /send-reminders → reminder engine (called by cron every 30min)
POST /cleanup-slots → slot release (called by cron every hour)

critical_bugs_found.detail: ghost-room.html 'Start Simulation' button routes to /#simulator. Embedding it in an iframe on index.html creates an infinite redirect loop.
critical_bugs_found.fix: Removed all iframe code. Simulator section is now a teaser panel. All CTAs open ghost-room.html via target=_blank (new tab).

critical_bugs_found.detail: All 7 nav submenu items pointed to #services (section top). No individual card anchors existed.
critical_bugs_found.fix: Added id to each service card. Added scroll-margin-top:5rem. Updated all nav submenu hrefs.

critical_bugs_found.bug: public/index.html silently reverted to Arabic v3.1
critical_bugs_found.detail: File was reverted between sessions without a clear git commit. Live site served Arabic v3.1 instead of English v3.3.
critical_bugs_found.fix: Rewrote English v3.4. Always Read file before Write to confirm lang=en.

known_open_issues: dashboard/dist/ must be manually built — Render only runs npm install
ghost-room.html is Arabic-only — no English version for non-Arabic traffic
ghost-room.html has no active CTA beyond /#simulator redirect (now target=_blank) — no Stripe or direct WhatsApp CTA
/api/analytics returns real data but React dashboard may show stale mock data

completed_steps.step_name: Landing Page Hybrid Architecture Merge (v3.1 Arabic)
insights: v3.1 Arabic glassmorphism Tailwind — had Three Layers of Consciousness section, live metrics bar, embedded simChat, Operations Room link.
This was the reference design for the 'old Arabic styling' the user wants to blend.

completed_steps.step_name: Premium Desktop + Global Nav (v3.1 Arabic polish)
insights: Global hamburger menu applied to Arabic v3.1.

completed_steps.step_name: Full Architecture Audit + v3.4 English Surface Upgrade
insights: File revert discovered — always Read before Write on index.html.
Simulator loop is a permanent architectural constraint — never iframe ghost-room.html.
gold accent (#C9A84C) unified across all UI elements for premium feel matching ghost-room.html.
System clock in simulator chrome creates visual continuity between landing page and ghost-room.
decisions: Simulator: teaser panel + target=_blank. Never iframe.
Service IDs: 7 unique anchors with scroll-margin-top.
fixes_applied: Arabic revert corrected — English v3.4 written
All 7 service cards augmented with How-it-works 3-step flows
Operations Room link restored in footer
Gold accent applied throughout (labels, borders, corners, tier names)
ui_upgrades: Gold geometric corner brackets on service icon panels
Live KSA system clock in simulator chrome bar
Social proof pill in simulator section

next_action.instruction: Verify commit 38f4310 live on qudozen.com. Check: English v3.4 loads, nav submenu deep-links work, simulator opens ghost-room in new tab, gold accents visible. Next potential task: upgrade ghost-room.html to English or add WhatsApp CTA to it.

critical_rules: NEVER iframe ghost-room.html — it loops back to /#simulator
ALWAYS Read public/index.html before Writing — confirm lang=en on line 1
Service nav submenu must deep-link to individual IDs: service-receptionist, service-realestate, service-web, service-apps, service-automation, service-growth, service-analytics
ghost-room.html is for Growth Swarm leads (accepts ?clinic=X&city=Y) — not a general simulator
Bot language: Arabic-first (ar is default for Saudi patients)
All date logic uses preferred_date_iso (YYYY-MM-DD) — never preferred_date (display string)
Never expose Supabase keys in frontend
dashboard/dist/ must be pre-built — Render only runs npm install
